== Films with multiple nominations and awards ==
{{col-begin|width=70%}}
{{col-1-of-2}}

{| class="wikitable plainrowheaders" style="text-align: center; margin-right:1em;"
|+ Films with multiple nominations
|-
! scope="col" style="width:55px;"| Nominations
! scope="col" style="text-align:center;"| Film
|-
| scope="row" rowspan="2"| 6
| ''Deadly Vows''
|-
| ''Escape From Camp Conversion''
|-
| scope="row" rowspan="3"| 5
| ''Clout''
|-
| ''Hard Stop''
|-
| ''Strip''
|-
| scope="row" rowspan="4"| 4
| ''Mon Amour''
|-
| ''Once Upon a Time in the Valley''
|-
| ''Seth Gamble''
|-
| ''Transpirella''
|-
| scope="row" rowspan="14"| 3
| ''Angela White''
|-
| ''[[Anna Claire Clouds]]''
|-
| ''Elly Clutch''
|-
| ''Ghosted''
|-
| ''Her Best Friend’s Dad''
|-
| ''Hollywood Whore: A Jennifer White Showcase Film''
|-
| ''Isiah Maxwell''
|-
| ''The Holdup''
|-
| ''[[Tommy Pistol]]''
|-
| ''Transtoinette''
|-
| ''Wanted''
|-
| ''Wicked Sensual Care''
|-
| ''“Trinity”''
|-
| ''“Wouldn’t Hurt a Fly”''
|-
| scope="row" rowspan="62"| 2
| ''After Dark''
|-
| ''Angelo Godshack''
|-
| ''Ariel Demure''
|-
| ''Bad Dragon''
|-
| ''Blake Blossom''
|-
| ''Blake Lovely''
|-
| ''Blissfull Creations''
|-
| ''Brittney Kade''
|-
| ''Charles Dera''
|-
| ''Charlie Forde''
|-
| ''Cherry Kiss''
|-
| ''Chloe Surreal''
|-
| ''Clash of the Vikings''
|-
| ''Codey Steele''
|-
| ''Cory Chase''
|-
| ''Danny D''
|-
| ''Enigma''
|-
| ''Exploration of Lust''
|-
| ''In Vogue II''
|-
| ''Ink Motel 6''
|-
| ''Ivan''
|-
| ''Jason Luv''
|-
| ''[[Jennifer White (pornographic film actress)|Jennifer White]]''
|-
| ''Kama Sutra''
|-
| ''Leilani Li''
|-
| ''[[Lexi Luna]]''
|-
| ''Lilly Bell''
|-
| ''Little Puck''
|-
| ''Long Con''
|-
| ''Lovense''
|-
| ''Mama Plugs''
|-
| ''Marcello Bravo''
|-
| ''Mind Games''
|-
| ''Mr. Nice''
|-
| ''Nicole Kitt''
|-
| ''Parker Ambrose''
|-
| ''Payback’s a Bitch''
|-
| ''Penny Barber''
|-
| ''Pigalle''
|-
| ''Play''
|-
| ''Please Hold: A XXX Parody''
|-
| ''Reagan Foxx''
|-
| ''Ricky Johnson''
|-
| ''Scott Nails''
|-
| ''Shared: A Hotwife Origin Story''
|-
| ''Skitty''
|-
| ''Sliquid''
|-
| ''Sophia Locke''
|-
| ''Sportsheets''
|-
| ''The Blueprint''
|-
| ''The Dungeon Store''
|-
| ''The Red Door: An Octavia Red Showcase Film''
|-
| ''TheKinkShop.com''
|-
| ''Three 4''
|-
| ''Victor Ray''
|-
| ''Vince Karter''
|-
| ''Visions: Luna Luxxx''
|-
| ''XR Brands''
|-
| ''Xander Corvus''
|-
| ''pjur''
|-
| ''“Let Me in Too”''
|-
| ''“Olivia Jay Takes Big Cock”''
|}

{{col-2-of-2}}

{| class="wikitable plainrowheaders" style="text-align: center; margin-right:1em;"
|+ Films with multiple wins
|-
! scope="col" style="width:55px;"| Awards
! scope="col" style="text-align:center;"| Film
|-
| scope="row" rowspan="5"| 2
| ''Angela White''
|-
| ''Chloe Surreal''
|-
| ''Mama Plugs''
|-
| ''Ricky Greenwood''
|-
| ''Skitty''
|}

{{col-end}}
